face.structure: symmetrical with high cheekbones and a pointed chin
face.expression: scrutinizing with a hint of reserved interest

skin.rendering_notes: crisp and light reflects subtly on cheekbones

hair.color: jet black with subtle hints of blue
hair.style: long and straight with blunt bangs

character.aura: a sense of precision and quiet strength

outfit.design: simple yet elegant with sharp lines

composition.framing: medium close-up centered around the shoulders and head
composition.pose: standing with one arm crossed over the other at torso level
composition.gesture: right hand lightly touching chin as if in thought

background.color_palette: neutral hues with grey and beige tones
background.rules: background should not draw attention away from the character
